description_long: This bungalow features a striking modern architectural design with angular, overlapping white roofs and a mix of white and brown exterior walls. The structure is set on a rectangular gray base, with a prominent front entrance accessed by a set of green steps and a recessed porch area. Large, geometric overhangs and cantilevered sections create dynamic shadows and visual interest, while vertical and horizontal window slits punctuate the facade. The side elevations reveal a combination of solid wall segments and glass, with the rear showcasing a partially covered balcony or terrace. The use of white, brown, and gray materials gives the building a clean, contemporary appearance. The overall form is low and elongated, emphasizing horizontal lines and open spaces.
description: A modern, angular bungalow with overlapping white roofs, brown and white walls, and geometric window slits, set on a gray base. The design features a recessed porch, green steps, and a mix of solid and glass elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, green steps, recessed porch, and a prominent overhanging roof.
description_view_1: Side perspective highlighting the angular, layered roof structure and the interplay of brown and white wall segments.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a partially covered balcony or terrace and the elongated horizontal form of the building.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with vertical window slits and a clear view of the cantilevered roof and wall sections.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with horizontal and vertical window slits
